data.title: HCW Biologics prices $1.5M follow-on offering on NASDAQ at $0.6055 per unit, includes 2,477,292 units with shares & warrants.
data.description: HCW Biologics Inc., a U.S.-based biopharmaceutical company, has announced the pricing of a follow-on offering of 2,477,292 units at $0.6055 per unit under Nasdaq rules. Each unit includes one share of common stock or a pre-funded warrant and one warrant to purchase a share of common stock. The warrant has an exercise price of $0.6055 and expires on the five-year anniversary from shareholder approval. The offering is expected to close on February 19, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.
Industries Federation: Thailand’s industrial sentiment climbs to 88.7 in January.

data.title: eToro stock soars 20% on Q4 earnings surge supported by crypto revenue. CEO Yoni Assia prepares for on-chain financial system.
data.description: Yoni Assia, the CEO of eToro, has stated that he is preparing the trading platform for a financial system that is shifting towards on-chain operations. This decision comes as the platform saw a significant increase in cryptocurrency revenues during the fourth quarter.

data.title: Judge rules boneless wings are still wings after Chicago man's 2023 lawsuit against Buffalo Wild Wings for false advertising.
data.description: In 2023, a male resident of Chicago initiated a legal case against Buffalo Wild Wings claiming misleading marketing of their boneless wings. The judge dismissed the lawsuit stating it lacked substantial evidence.
Breman says RBNZ intends to hold eight meetings in the coming year.

data.title: Renovations to Hacienda Tres Ríos hotel in Riviera Maya aim to enhance guest experience with more comfort and exclusivity.
data.description: In Riviera Maya, Mexico, on February 17, 2026, Sunset World Group's Hacienda Tres Ríos hotel has undergone renovations aimed at improving the experience for its members and guests. These enhancements have been made to enhance comfort, exclusivity, and overall well-being. Notable additions include new Swim-Up facilities that aim to elevate the hospitality offerings.
